ground_truth.title: Road Reports and Web Cameras
ground_truth.main_content: This page provides links to road reports and web cameras for the San Joaquin Valley, California region. The webcams are organized by geographic area: West Side Hills (SR 152 at Dinosaur Point, SR 152 at San Luis Reservoir, SR 46 and SR 33 at Blackwell's Corner), Merced and Madera (Livingston, Atwater, Merced, Sierra Vista, Chowchilla, Madera, Madera Ranchos), Western San Joaquin Valley (Firebaugh, Cantua Creek, Coalinga, Avenal), Foggy Bottom (Kerman, Lemoore, Armona, Hanford), Fresno Area (Fresno, Fowler, Selma, Kingsburg, Clovis, Sanger), Tulare County (Kingsburg, Traver, Goshen, Tulare, Visalia, Porterville), Western San Joaquin Valley in Kern County (Lost Hills, Buttonwillow, Tupman), Eastern San Joaquin Valley in Kern County (Delano, Famoso), Bakersfield Area, Central Sierra Foothills (Midpines, Mariposa, Oakhurst, Prather), Southern Sierra Foothills (Ash Peaks, Kaweah River), Central Sierra (Lee Vining at Mono Lake, Mono Lake, Yosemite Ahwahnee), Sequoia Kings (Buck Rock, Milk Ranch, Park Ridge, Bald Mountain, Jordan Peak, Sherman Peak), Lake Isabella Area (Breckenridge, Wofford Heights), and Fort Tejon/Grapevine Area (Grapevine, Lebec). The page includes a disclaimer noting these webcams are used with permission of owners and do not constitute an endorsement by the NWS.
with: Moisture from the Pacific will stream into Northern California, producing rain this weekend, increasing to heavy rain during Sunday.
This page provides links to road reports and web cameras for the San Joaquin Valley, California region.
The webcams are organized by geographic area including West Side Hills, Merced and Madera, Fresno Area, and Bakersfield Area.
SR 152 at Dinosaur Point - Eastbound, SR 152 at San Luis Reservoir - Eastbound, SR 46 and SR 33 at Blackwell's Corner - Westbound.
These webcams are used with the permission of the owners, including citizens, government & private organizations, ski areas or educational facilities.
